payload.answer: Rejected: do not store an entire 8000-word transcript as a single conversation_summary memory card. It is too large, low-signal, and not durable as a memory artifact.
citations: Input: "LLM proposal - one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript"

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity should be created from an entire transcript summary proposal; the content is too broad and insufficiently distilled for stable memory.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to commit a proposed memory card for a full 8000-word transcript.
repair_options: Split the transcript into smaller, atomic memory cards with clear durability.
Omit transient dialogue details, filler, and redundant paraphrase.
